privileged_info_summary: The wetted perimeter analysis on the Muncie HEC-RAS model uses the most downstream cross-section (River Station 237.6455) in the first Reach. The thalweg elevation is 913.96 ft and the maximum bank elevation is 939.75 ft. When calculating the wetted perimeter for exactly 25 water surface elevations evenly spaced from the thalweg to the maximum bank elevation, the maximum rate of change (dWP/dStage = 32.95 ft/ft) occurs at a stage of 937.60 ft. This breakpoint corresponds to a depth of 23.64 ft above the thalweg and a wetted perimeter of 229.16 ft.
